title: noccaea microphylla
intro: Noccaea microphylla, also known as creeping penny-cress, is a low-growing, annual or biennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Noccaea microphylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures.
